ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the athlete represents */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the athlete */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance category of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES performance_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meets" (
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meet */,
  "meet_name" TEXT /* Name of the meet */,
  "meet_date" TEXT /* Date of the meet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meet */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization or body organizing the meet */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Information about the sponsors of the meet */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the meet's official website */,
  "entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee for the meet */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the meet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who performed */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meet where the performance took place */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time achieved by the athlete */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Performance standard achieved */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored based on performance */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event within the meet */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the athlete in the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "min_score" INTEGER /* Minimum score required to achieve the standard */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score required to achieve the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standards_standard_name FOREIGN KEY ("standard_name") REFERENCES performances ("standard")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the category (e.g., Age15, Age16) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the category */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meet where the event took place */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who achieved the result */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event within the meet */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the athlete in the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
